title: DelegationTokenClaims
description: AITP v0.2 delegation token — decoded JWS payload claims (RFC-AITP-0006). On the wire a delegation token is an opaque compact JWS string (typ 'aitp-delegation+jwt') signed by the delegator-of-record (iss). It embeds the issuing peer's grant voucher verbatim as the `voucher` claim; no reconstruction is performed anywhere. Single-hop is the core default (no `chain` claim). Multi-hop chains (RFC-AITP-0011, Draft opt-in) are carried in the optional `chain` and `chain_hash` claims.

CompactJws.description: RFC 7515 compact JWS: exactly three non-empty unpadded-base64url segments.

ver.description: Protocol version private claim. MUST be 'aitp/0.2'.

iss.description: AID of the agent issuing this delegation (B, the delegator-of-record). The outer JWS is signed by this key. MUST equal the embedded voucher's sub.

sub.description: AID of the agent receiving delegation (C). Self-delegation (iss == sub) is rejected.

aud.description: AID of the verifying issuer (A). MUST equal the verifier's own AID; prevents use at other verifiers. Single string, never an array.

scope.description: Capabilities delegated to C. MUST be a subset of the embedded voucher's grants.

exp.description: Unix timestamp of expiry. MUST be <= the embedded voucher's exp.

cnf.description: RFC 7800 confirmation claim for C's key, jkt form only (RFC-AITP-0001 §5.4.4). MUST match the key encoded in sub.

voucher.description: The issuing peer's grant voucher (typ 'aitp-grant+jwt', RFC-AITP-0005 §8), embedded VERBATIM. REQUIRED on single-hop tokens (no `chain`). On multi-hop tokens (RFC-AITP-0011, Draft) only `chain[0]` carries the voucher — the outer token MUST NOT. Decoded claims validate against aitp-grant-voucher.schema.json. Covered by the outer signature, so it cannot be swapped.

jti.description: UUID v4. Per-hop revocation handle — REQUIRED on every delegation token that participates in a multi-hop chain (RFC-AITP-0011, Draft); absent on single-hop core tokens (RFC-AITP-0006 defines no jti).

chain.description: OPTIONAL multi-hop chain (RFC-AITP-0011, Draft opt-in). Each entry is a prior-hop delegation token as a verbatim compact JWS string, ordered oldest hop first. Core implementations MUST reject any token carrying this claim with DELEGATION_MULTIHOP_NOT_SUPPORTED.

chain_hash.description: REQUIRED if `chain` is present (RFC-AITP-0011). base64url(sha256(JCS array of the base64url SHA-256 digests of each chain string)). Bound into the outer signature so a hop cannot be removed or reordered without invalidating it.

ext.description: Optional extension namespace per RFC-AITP-0001 §5.4.5 and RFC-AITP-0012. Unknown keys inside ext MUST be ignored; unknown claims outside it are rejected by this schema.
